mapper.insert: INSERT INTO public.users (username, password, email, create_at, update_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{email}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, username, password, email, create_at::TIMESTAMP AS create_at, update_at::TIMESTAMP AS update_at FROM public.users WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, username, password, email, create_at::TIMESTAMP AS create_at, update_at::TIMESTAMP AS update_at FROM public.users WHERE username = #{username}
SELECT id, username, password, email, create_at::TIMESTAMP AS create_at, update_at::TIMESTAMP AS update_at FROM public.users WHERE email = #{email}
mapper.update: UPDATE public.users SET password = #{newPassword}, update_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
